app.name: Pipedream
app.one_liner: An open-source, event-driven automation platform that connects 1,000+ apps with custom code in Node.js, Python, Go, or Bash.

screens.name: Workflow Builder
screens.purpose: Design and manage event-driven automations by selecting triggers and sequencing actions or custom code steps.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a workflow configuration including its trigger, steps, and metadata.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic action library for Slack and Google Sheets
week 1: Enable Node.js custom code step execution
acceptance_tests: User can add a custom Python step that processes incoming event data.
User can create a workflow triggered by an HTTP request and send a message to Slack.
